case_title: DANIA PATRICIA VENTURA MEMBRENO VS. MARIA ELENA GONZALES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE:$40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMBRENO, DANIA PATRICIA VENTURA AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARIA ELENA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
